RuleSet.Name: libschema/schema/SchemaTableHPKey.hpp
RuleSet.Descr: C++18 specification of a $TableName$ history primary key object.
RuleSet.GenRule: : public $CPlusDefNamespace$::$DefSchemaName$$TableName$HPKey
: public $SchemaName$HPKey
$declHPKeyComparisonLessThan$ $declHPKeyComparisonLessOrEqual$ $declHPKeyComparisonEqual$ $declHPKeyComparisonNotEqual$ $declHPKeyComparisonGreaterOrEqual$ $declHPKeyComparisonGreaterThan$

namespace std { $declStdHPKeyComparisonLessThan$ $declStdHPKeyComparisonLessOrEqual$ $declStdHPKeyComparisonEqual$ $declStdHPKeyComparisonNotEqual$ $declStdHPKeyComparisonGreaterOrEqual$ $declStdHPKeyComparisonGreaterThan$ $implStdHPKeyHash$ }
